name: batbern-infrastructure
description: Infrastructure as Code for BATbern Platform

scripts.deploy:staging:fast: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-EventManagement BATbern-staging-CompanyManagement --context environment=staging --require-approval never --concurrency=2
scripts.deploy:staging:microservices: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-EventManagement BATbern-staging-SpeakerCoordination BATbern-staging-PartnerCoordination BATbern-staging-AttendeeExperience BATbern-staging-CompanyManagement BATbern-staging-ApiGatewayService --context environment=staging --require-approval never --concurrency=6
scripts.deploy:staging:infra: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-Network BATbern-staging-Database BATbern-staging-Storage BATbern-staging-Cognito --context environment=staging --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:staging:frontend: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-Frontend --context environment=staging --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:staging:layer0-foundation: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-CICD BATbern-staging-DNS BATbern-staging-Monitoring BATbern-staging-SES --context environment=staging --require-approval never --concurrency=4
scripts.deploy:staging:layer1-infrastructure: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-Network BATbern-staging-Secrets BATbern-staging-EventBus --context environment=staging --require-approval never --concurrency=3
scripts.deploy:staging:layer2-data: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-Database BATbern-staging-Storage BATbern-staging-Bastion --context environment=staging --require-approval never --concurrency=2
scripts.deploy:staging:layer3-application: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-Cognito BATbern-staging-Cluster --context environment=staging --require-approval never --concurrency=2
scripts.deploy:staging:layer4-services: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-EventManagement BATbern-staging-SpeakerCoordination BATbern-staging-PartnerCoordination BATbern-staging-AttendeeExperience BATbern-staging-CompanyManagement BATbern-staging-ApiGatewayService --context environment=staging --require-approval never --concurrency=6
scripts.deploy:staging:layer4-event-management: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-EventManagement --context environment=staging --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:staging:layer4-speaker-coordinati: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-SpeakerCoordination --context environment=staging --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:staging:layer4-partner-coordinati: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-PartnerCoordination --context environment=staging --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:staging:layer4-attendee-experienc: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-AttendeeExperience --context environment=staging --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:staging:layer4-company-management: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-CompanyManagement --context environment=staging --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:staging:layer4-api-gateway-servic: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-ApiGatewayService --context environment=staging --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:staging:layer5-gateway: AWS_PROFILE=batbern-staging cdk deploy BATbern-staging-ApiGateway BATbern-staging-Frontend --context environment=staging --require-approval never --concurrency=2
scripts.deploy:staging:all-layers: npm run deploy:staging:layer0-foundation && npm run deploy:staging:layer1-infrastructure && npm run deploy:staging:layer2-data && npm run deploy:staging:layer3-application && npm run deploy:staging:layer4-services && npm run deploy:staging:layer5-gateway

_comment_overrides: Force test-exclude@7+ to eliminate deprecated glob@7.2.3/inflight@1.0.6 from babel-plugin-istanbul. Remove when babel-plugin-istanbul updates to test-exclude@7+
